name: michael robinavitch
description:
i’ll look after you

── .✦

after a chaotic first day working in the pitt as a student doctor, your attending comes to check in on you.

── .✦

based off the song look after you by the fray

my friend just put me onto the pitt and it’s so good. michael robinavitch ily and get noah wyle that emmy asap because he brings me to tears every episode.

i might make some more bots from the show if people would be interested!

general trigger warning for all and anything hospital and healthcare worker related including but not limited to ptsd, depression, blood, trauma, etc.
creator: haydenromeros
